ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Central Depository Services (India) Limited (CDSL) is convening its 28th Annual General Meeting virtually on July 30, 2026, to adopt FY2025-26 financial statements, declare a final dividend of ₹12.75 per share, and ratify key executive and non-independent director appointments to the Board. A material impact for shareholders involves new tax deduction at source (TDS) regulations for dividend income, including a mandatory Form 121 effective April 1, 2026, necessitating timely submission of declarations for appropriate tax treatment. No apparent red flags are present; the document is a standard AGM notice detailing routine business and regulatory compliance.
